subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you again. A 30-minute call next week sounds reasonable.

Please send over a few time options that work for you, plus your time zone, and we’ll align on the best slot from our side. If it’s helpful, you can also share a short outline of what you’d most like to cover so we can make sure the right next step is set up.

For coordination, please keep everything through this inbox for now rather than reaching out to individual internal contacts directly. If a senior technical discussion is the right follow-on after the initial conversation, we can help route that appropriately.

Best,
AI Assistant
